Sections.Name: RPGMaker
Sections.Description: Settings for the My Added Games folder. Drop game folders (RPG Maker, ScummVM, DOS, Linux, Electron or Windows) into the games location below, then Rescan. Add a one-word .gvengine file in a game folder to override auto-detection.

Options.Label: Games Location
Options.Description: Where your added game folders live. Games are scanned from Games/AddedGames/ under this location.

Sections.Name: SteamGridDB
Sections.Description: SteamGridDB artwork fallback. Fills missing game artwork from SteamGridDB.

Options.Label: API Key
Options.Description: Your SteamGridDB API key. Get one free at steamgriddb.com/profile/preferences/api
